title: juno cycloglossa
side_effects: Juno cycloglossa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, respiratory distress, and even anaphylaxis in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant may also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, the plant's extracts can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and decrease their effectiveness. In severe cases, improper use of Juno cycloglossa can cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure.
